title: Executive Order 8832—Amendment of Executive Order No. 8389 of April 10, 1940, as Amended
text:
By virtue of the authority vested in me by section 5 (b) of the Act of October 6, 1917 (40 Stat. 415), as amended, and by virtue of all other authority vested in me, I, Franklin D. Roosevelt, President of the United States of America, do hereby amend Executive Order No. 8389 of April 10, 1940, as amended, by changing the period at the end of subdivision (j) of Section 3 of such Order to a semicolon and adding the following new subdivision thereafter:
(k) June 14, 1941
—China, and Japan.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
July 26, 1941.
